title: Unlocking Advanced Typography: Master CSS 'font-feature-settings' for Web Fonts
tweet: Beyond the basics! Elevate your UI design & readability with advanced OpenType features. Master CSS 'font-feature-settings' for ligatures, fractions & more in web typography. #CSSTypography #WebFonts #UIDesign
tip: Leverage 'font-feature-settings' to enable specific OpenType features like discretionary ligatures ('dlig'), old-style figures ('onum'), or small caps ('smcp'). This brings print-quality typography to the web, significantly enhancing readability and aesthetic appeal, especially for brand-specific fonts. Always test across browsers as support for specific features can vary and requires the font to embed those features.
